temporal_description: In a dimly lit indoor space, two men stand close together, engaged in a conversation. The man on the left, wearing a light blue, short-sleeved button-down shirt and dark trousers, leans forward with a slight smile, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. The man on the right, dressed in a dark suit and tie, listens with a more serious expression. The background is dark and indistinct, with what appears to be a staircase railing in the foreground and some translucent plastic sheeting hanging behind the men. In the upper left corner of the screen, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The camera remains stationary, holding a medium shot of the two individuals. A man speaks in a calm, conversational tone, saying, "这次不行就算了" (Let's just forget it this time). Another man replies in a slightly apologetic and hesitant voice, "对不起" (Sorry). The first man lets out a short, dismissive laugh, sounding a bit exasperated but not angry. The background is quiet, with no music or significant sound effects, focusing the listener's attention on the dialogue.
